headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Phillips 66 (PSX) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Phillips 66 still represents good value after a strong run, or if you might be late to the story, this breakdown aims to help you frame that question clearly before you make any moves. The stock last closed at US$175.47, with returns of 1.6% over 7 days, 12.7% over 30 days, 34.4% year to date and 45.0% over 1 year, contributing to a 108.3% return over 3 years and 152.2% over 5 years. Recent headlines around Phillips 66 have focused on its positioning within the...
